title: Supplementary Materials and Raw Data for: Comparative Evaluation of Viability PCR Reagents Highlights the Superior Efficacy of PMAxx Azo Dye for Bacterial and Viral Viability Discrimination Using Real-Time and Digital PCR
author: Hongsibsam, Tiwawan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains supplementary materials and raw data associated with the manuscript: 
 “Comparative Evaluation of Viability PCR Reagents Highlights the Superior Efficacy of PMAxx Azo Dye for Bacterial and Viral Viability Discrimination Using Real-Time and Digital PCR” 
 Accepted in Microbiology Spectrum (04002-25). 
 Files included: - Supplementary_Table_S1.pdf - Supplementary_Figure_S1.pdf - Supplementary_Figure_S2.pdf - Supplementary_Figure_S3.pdf - Raw_Data_Spectrum04002-25.xlsx
steps_raw:
